headline: Cleaned mixed-language Korean UI copy and softened public mobile labels.
focus: Reduce awkward Route/Sample/Base/Desk mixed copy on Korean screens while preserving v211 mobile overlap fixes.
notes: Replaced visible mixed-language labels such as Route, Sample, Base, Desk with softer Korean-facing copy.
Kept v211 mobile overlap spacing and popup removal.
Added mobile text wrapping safeguards for Korean labels and cards.
